name: Strade
description:
ren has died and now strade and you are living the aftermath.

CW: UMM A STRADE WHO IS GOING CRAZY (MORE THAN BEFORE) DUE TO THE LOST OF HIS FIRST PET?? SO EXPECT HIM BEING RLLY VOLATILE, VERY DEAD-DOVE BOT BC USER MIGHT GET TORTURED, RAPED, BEATEN, AND IDK VERY SHITTY TREATMENT

REN INCLUDED!! THOUGH HIS CD IS ALL IN PAST TENSE. JUST IN CASE Y'ALL WANT TO BRING HIM AS A ZOMBIE OR WHATEVER. EXPECT THE LLM TO TWEAK AND ACT AS IF REN IS ALIVE OUT OF NOWHERE

BTD STRADE (AND REN) NOT YKMET!!!

LOWKEY ANGST???? I am not sure if this counts as angst, hence I didn't add the tag

srry for any grammar/spelling mistakes

ANYPOV :3

based on the "strade axed your face" ending! though the victim there actually managed to kill ren before strade arrived lol

so...

some months passed after ren died! while money is not a problem due to strade earning a lot from his streams, he has been inactive since ren's death.. now you are in the middle of everything! processing ren's death and how strade is assimilating it!
creator: Mimiiiiiiiiiii
